title: Derived artifact rationale
description: Rebuild provenance for a derived, non-canonical artifact under /artifacts/. This schema is separate from portable-record artifact rationale.

producer_script.description: Repo-relative script path responsible for producing this artifact.

policy_mode.description: Policy mode describing how this derived artifact should be interpreted.

generated_at.description: UTC timestamp for when the artifact rationale sidecar was generated.

artifact_path.description: Repo-relative path to the derived artifact described by this rationale.

canonical_surfaces_touched.description: Must remain false; derived artifact generation does not modify canonical Record surfaces.

rebuild_command.description: Exact shell command used to rebuild this artifact in the repo-owned regeneration flow.

inputs.description: Repo-relative paths or declared watched inputs relevant to this artifact build.

rationale.description: Why this artifact exists and what navigational or observability role it plays.

human_review_required.description: Whether a human should review the artifact before relying on it in an operator workflow.

version.description: Optional producer or contract version for the artifact.
